[Congressional Bills 105th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 42 Engrossed in House (EH)]


                 In the House of Representatives, U.S.,

                                                      February 6, 1997.
    Resolved, That the following named Member be, and that he is hereby, elected 
to the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:
    Committee on Science: Mr. Brown of California.
    In lieu of the Members elected in H. Res. 36 to the following committees, 
the following Members:
    Committee on Small Business: Mr. LaFalce, Mr. Skelton, Mr. Sisisky, Mr. 
Flake, Mr. Poshard, Ms. Velazquez, Mr. Luther, Mr. Baldacci, Mr. Jackson of 
Illinois, Ms. Millender-McDonald, Mr. Weygand, Mr. Davis of Illinois, Mr. Boyd, 
Ms. McCarthy of New York, Mr. Pascrell, and Mr. Goode.
    Committee on Veterans' Affairs: Mr. Evans, Mr. Kennedy of Massachusetts, Mr. 
Filner, Mr. Gutierrez, Mr. Bishop, Mr. Clyburn, Ms. Brown of Florida, Mr. Doyle, 
Mr. Mascara, Mr. Peterson of Minnesota, Mrs. Carson, Mr. Reyes, and Mr. Snyder.
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
